smoke_test.output_excerpt:
[runtime-audit smoke] 2 warnings:
  [progressionReachability] [INCOMPLETE_DATA] quest=extract_dna no source recorded for item 'bio_sample_agave' — add to sceneItemGrants.js or quests.js reward
  [progressionReachability] [INCOMPLETE_DATA] quest=engineer_bacteria no source recorded for item 'bio_sample_bacteria' — add to sceneItemGrants.js or quests.js reward
  1 passed (3.1s)

Note: zero '[ecology] registerEntity: unknown speciesId' warnings for agave or yucca. The two remaining warnings are pre-existing progressionReachability INCOMPLETE_DATA notices for bio_sample_agave and bio_sample_bacteria (item-source mapping, unrelated to species registration).

preflight_quotes.flora_js: FLORA canonical pattern (prickly_pear): { name: 'prickly_pear', label: 'Prickly Pear', elevation: [0, 5000], moistureMax: 0.25, density: 0.6, cluster: true, clusterRadius: 25, clusterCount: 3, size: 'small', color: 0x3a7d44, emoji: '🌵', pharmacology: { hydrating: 0.3, nutritive: 0.25, metabolic: 0.2, toxicity: 0 }, scienceInteractions: { ... }, foraging: { maturityDays: 4, ... } }
preflight_quotes.ecology_js: PLANT_ECOLOGY entries: agave: { supports: ['rabbit'], predatorsNearby: ['coyote'], pollinators: ['bats', 'insects'], spawnBoost: 0.3, biome: 'desert_scrub', producesFiber: true }; yucca: { supports: [], predatorsNearby: [], pollinators: ['insects'], spawnBoost: 0.3, biome: 'desert_scrub', producesSaponin: true, producesFiber: true }
preflight_quotes.items_js: agave_fiber: { id: 'agave_fiber', name: 'Agave Fiber & Sap', description: 'Strong fibers for binding and healing sap for wounds.', icon: '🧵', category: 'foraged', stackable: true, plantSource: 'agave' }; yucca_root: { id: 'yucca_root', name: 'Yucca Root', description: 'Rich in saponins — natural soap. Used for cleaning and surfactant extraction.', icon: '🌴', category: 'foraged', stackable: true, plantSource: 'yucca' }
preflight_quotes.speciesResolver_js: export function getFloraSpecies(speciesId) { if (typeof speciesId !== 'string') return null; return FLORA_MAP[speciesId] ?? null; } — speciesResolver looks up FLORA via FLORA_MAP (which is Object.fromEntries(FLORA.map(f => [f.name, f]))), and resolveSpeciesType returns 'flora' iff FLORA_MAP has the speciesId.
preflight_quotes.EcologyEntity_js: registerEntity throw site (in systems/ecology/index.js, not EcologyEntity.js): throw new Error(`[ecology] registerEntity: unknown speciesId "${speciesId}" (not in FLORA/FAUNA)`); — fires when resolveSpeciesType returns null (no FLORA_MAP / FAUNA_MAP hit).
preflight_quotes.street_block_layout_json: plants: [ ..., { species: 'agave', label: 'Agave Plant', x: 450, y: 460, radius: 55 }, { species: 'yucca', label: 'Yucca Plant', x: 150, y: 620, radius: 50 }, ... ] — confirmed 10 declared plants including agave and yucca.
preflight_quotes.ecology_manifest_json: agave: { file: 'plants/agave.png', type: 'plant', displayName: 'Agave', scientificName: 'Agave parryi', interactions: ['observe', 'forage'], tags: ['producer', 'succulent', 'desert_scrub'] }; yucca: { file: 'plants/yucca.png', type: 'plant', displayName: 'Yucca', scientificName: 'Yucca elata', interactions: ['observe'], tags: ['producer', 'fiber', 'iconic', 'desert_scrub'] }
preflight_quotes.swarm_orchestrator_md: Hard rules: 'Never edit code yourself. You orchestrate. Workers code.' — and PASS verdicts must be tagged runtime-validated or static-only on critical paths.

notes.speciesresolver_lookup_path: registerEntity (systems/ecology/index.js) -> resolveSpeciesType (speciesResolver.js) -> isFloraSpecies -> Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(FLORA_MAP, speciesId). FLORA_MAP is built at module load via Object.fromEntries(FLORA.map((f) => [f.name, f])). Adding entries with name: 'agave' and name: 'yucca' to FLORA was sufficient — no other registry surface needed updating.
notes.runtime_validation_status: agave + yucca warnings no longer appear in smoke test
